translated: Mei-chan, you've become quite reliable lately.
Yes.
My sister also seems to trust Mei-senpai a great deal.
N-Natsumi does?
It certainly doesn't look that way.
Yeah, yeah.
I feel like Mei-chan naturally leads the first and second years,
and gives them a push forward.
Just as Kanon-senpai says, Mei-senpai takes the lead in bringing us together.
Well, that's just...
If I don't do it, everyone just does whatever they want,
so I have no choice.
It's impressive that you can act without hesitation in those moments.
If it were me, I'd just leave the leadership to Chi-chan or Ren-chan.
Mei-senpai was also very dependable when we headed to Music World.
Oh, I heard about that from Margarete-chan.
You really worked hard, Mei-chan.
At the time, I was hoping I could be a bit more like Chisato-senpai.
Well,
looking back now, I think I was being a little too tense.
I think that's perfectly fine.
Seeing Mei-senpai work hard has the benefit of making Liella more positive.
I totally get it!
It makes us feel like we can't afford to lose either.
Huh?
Kanon-senpai and the others?
No, no, no.
There's no way you seniors would lose to someone like me.
That's not true, Mei-chan.
You just said 'someone like me,' didn't you?
You have more power to move those around you than you realize.
And the kindness to support others, too.
Indeed.
Margarete says it often as well.
"I can't afford to lose to Mei-senpai."
She says.
I can definitely imagine her saying that.
By the way, Tomari, your Margarete impression is spot on.
I'm honored.
Anyway, Mei-chan, you're the driving force of Liella,
so we're counting on you from now on.
The driving force?
Well, that might be a bit of an exaggeration,
but I'm ready to fire up the engine anytime.
That's very reassuring.
In that case, please fire up my sister's motivation for the next periodic exams.
Oh,
that's a good idea.
Then fire up my passion for baking, too.
Don't get carried away, you two.
I can't look after you that much.
Love Live! Superstar!! Yuigaoka Girls' High School Broadcasting Station: Liella's Tomo-Kano-Mei!
Hello,
everyone!
I'm Date Sayuri, aka Sayurin, the voice of Shibuya Kanon.
I'm Sakakura Saki, aka Sakuchan, the voice of Onitsuka Tomari.
And I'm Yabushima Akane, aka Yabuchan,
the voice of Yoneme Mei.
We are
Liella!
It's a pleasure to be here.
Yay!
So, this time we're bringing you Tomo-Kano-Mei.
Mei-chan,
if you would.
Welcome to the show!
Please take it away.
Thanks for having me.
Today is March 24th, but March 28th is 'Sunny Pa Day',
and it's the birthday of Hijirisawa Yuna-chan and Yoshitake-chan!
That's amazing.
Happy birthday!
Sunny Pa Day really is Sunny Pa Day.
It's like destiny.
Yeah, it's just too incredible.
Isn't it great?
It's wonderful. Congratulations!
Let's all celebrate when the day comes.
Please do.
We're counting on you.
